name: NR Alzheimer/MCI bioenergetics trial is active without posted results
summary: Active-not-recruiting early phase 1 registry testing NR effects on brain energy metabolism, oxidative stress, and cognitive function in MCI or mild Alzheimer disease, with no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT04430517 as active/not recruiting with 50 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults and older adults with mild cognitive impairment or mild Alzheimer disease
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 50; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
